question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Volatility Index have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-04-26?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/VIXCLS once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-04-26 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-04-16) was 18.360. (The latest value released in CBOE Volatility Index: VIX from the release CBOE Market Statistics.)
background: The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: VIX measures market expectation of near term volatility conveyed by stock index option prices. Copyright, 2016, Chicago Board Options Exchange, Inc. Reprinted with permission..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Index.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily, Close
